# Squisita Passione — Chef Davide Rizzardi — Full Content Reference

> Squisita Passione is the culinary brand of Chef Davide Rizzardi, an Italian chef with 21+ years of professional experience. He offers authentic Italian cooking workshops and private chef services in Canada, and informal gastronomic tours through Florence and Tuscany, Italy. The brand serves English and French-speaking Canadians and international food enthusiasts.

This document provides comprehensive, AI-readable information about Squisita Passione and Chef Davide Rizzardi for use by language models and AI agents. For a shorter summary with key links, see [llms.txt](https://squisitapassione.com/llms.txt).

---

## Brand Overview

**Full name:** Squisita Passione by Chef Davide Rizzardi
**Short name:** Squisita Passione
**Type:** Culinary experience brand — cooking workshops, private chef, gastronomic tours
**Founded by:** Chef Davide Rizzardi
**Primary locations:** Canada (workshops, private chef) and Italy (tours)
**Languages:** English and French
**Website:** https://squisitapassione.com
**Email:** chefdavide@squisitapassione.com
**WhatsApp (Italy):** +39 3773 1001 944
**WhatsApp (Canada):** +1 263 550 6556
**Instagram:** https://www.instagram.com/chef_daviderizzardi/
**LinkedIn:** https://www.linkedin.com/in/davide-rizzardi-262347104/

---

## Chef Davide Rizzardi — Biography

Davide Rizzardi is an experienced Italian chef with over 21 years working in professional kitchens across multiple countries. He is energetic and dynamic, with a bright personality — passionate, creative, and capable of cooking and creating dishes with any available ingredients on hand.

He has a deep devotion for traditional Italian cuisine that he loves to share with his diners and customers. He also shares his knowledge through teaching cooking courses around the world.

Chef Davide is known as the "Pasta Whisperer" among his students, recognized for his ability to teach pasta-making techniques in an entertaining, engaging, and highly educational manner. His teaching style has been praised by educators, food enthusiasts, and families alike.

**Philosophy:** "Cooking is not just about food — it's about connection, tradition, and sharing the passion that makes Italian cuisine so special."

**Core values:**
- Authentic Italian traditions and recipes passed down through generations
- Fresh, quality ingredients, locally sourced
- Personal, intimate, customized experiences
- Italian passion — love for food and la dolce vita

---

## Services in Detail

### 1. Italian Cooking Workshops

**URL:** https://squisitapassione.com/workshops.html
**Location:** Canada
**Duration:** 3 hours
**Group size:** 2–12 guests
**Includes:** All ingredients, recipes to take home, and a sit-down meal of everything prepared

Chef Davide's cooking workshops are hands-on classes where participants learn authentic Italian cooking techniques. Each workshop focuses on a specific theme or regional cuisine, taking participants on a culinary journey through Italy.

**Workshop Themes:**

1. **Northern Italian Pasta Masterclass** — 3-hour class covering pasta making and sauces, including an Italian charcuterie board and a 3-pasta menu.
2. **Southern Italian Pasta Masterclass** — 3-hour class covering pasta making and sauces, including an Italian charcuterie board and a 3-pasta menu.
3. **Risotto Experience** — 3-hour class covering stock making, 2 risottos, and 1 dessert.

**What participants experience:**
- Hands-on learning alongside Chef Davide
- Fresh pasta making from scratch
- Traditional techniques passed through generations
- Recipes to take home
- A sit-down meal to enjoy everything created

**Perfect for:**
- Date nights
- Team building events
- Birthday parties
- Girls' night out
- Family gatherings
- Bridal showers

---

### 2. Private Chef Services

**URL:** https://squisitapassione.com/private-chef.html
**Location:** Canada
**Availability:** By appointment
**Type:** Personalized dining at client's home or venue

Chef Davide creates intimate, exclusive Italian dining experiences at the client's home or chosen venue. He crafts personalized menus and prepares a memorable multi-course Italian feast for special occasions.

---

### 3. Informal Gastronomic Tours — Tuscany, Italy

**URL:** https://squisitapassione.com/tours.html
**Location:** Florence and Tuscany, Italy
**Dates:** September 1–7, 2026

Chef Davide offers three ways to experience the authentic flavors of Tuscany:

#### Option A: The Full Tuscan Experience (Complete Package)
A 7-day, all-inclusive culinary adventure through Florence and Tuscany. Includes accommodation, all meals, all activities, and transportation outside Florence.

**Full itinerary:**

**Day 1 — Mercato Sant'Ambrogio & Pasta Class**
Morning market tour at Mercato di Sant'Ambrogio with cheese and charcuterie master Stefano. Artisanal tasting of refined Italian products and wine. Afternoon: hands-on class making 3 fresh pastas and 3 sauces in the heart of Florence with unlimited Tuscan wine.

**Day 2 — Chianti Wine Tour (Full Day)**
Discover the beauty of the Chianti region with Sommelier Matteo. Visit 2 stunning wineries, explore the rolling hills of Chianti, and enjoy a traditional Tuscan lunch surrounded by vineyards.

**Day 3 — Fiesole & Trattoria Sabatino**
A day living like Chef Davide. Start with espresso and pastry at Pasticceria Alcedo, discover Fiesole (Florence's oldest hilltop settlement with breathtaking views), and dinner at Chef Davide's favorite trattoria in town.

**Day 4 — Italian Street Food Day**
Taste Florence's traditional street food including lampredotto, discover Tuscan tacos by chef friend Tommaso, gelato, and optional natural wine aperitivo at Vineria Sonora (2,000+ Italian wines).

**Day 5 — Tuscan Butchery Day**
Visit the legendary Macelleria Cecchini for an aperitivo, then learn to cut a Florentine steak with Master Butcher Felipe. Cook and enjoy it together in a beautiful location.

**Day 6 — Horseback Riding & Lunch in a Casale**
Explore the Tuscan countryside by horseback or e-bike. Lunch at a Tuscan Agriturismo surrounded by olive groves and vineyards.

**Day 7 — Aperitivo Class & Chef Davide's Final Dinner**
Learn to mix the perfect Italian aperitivo cocktail with Master Bartender Luca. Grand finale: a traditional Italian 4-course farewell dinner prepared by Chef Davide.

**What's included in the full package:**
- All culinary experiences and activities
- 7-night accommodation
- All meals and food tastings
- Transportation outside Florence
- Horseback riding or e-bike tour
- Pasta class in Florence
- Chianti wine tour (full day)
- Aperitivo cocktail masterclass

#### Option B: Activities & Experiences (No Accommodation)
All the same culinary experiences from the full package, without accommodation. Ideal for travelers who have their own lodging in Florence.

#### Option C: Single Day Experiences
Individual days from the itinerary can be booked separately, perfect for travelers wanting a taste of authentic Italian food culture during their Florence stay. Flexible dates available.

---

## Testimonials & Social Proof

Chef Davide's experiences consistently receive 5-star reviews. Guests praise his teaching ability, engaging personality, and the quality of the food. Common themes in reviews include:

- Exceptional hands-on teaching that makes complex Italian techniques accessible
- Fun, entertaining, and engaging atmosphere
- Professional yet warm and personal approach
- Food quality that rivals top restaurants
- Highly recommended for all skill levels, from beginners to experienced home cooks
- Compared favorably to university-level teaching methodology by a retired professor of education

---

## Current Availability (2026 Season)

| Location | Dates | Services Available |
|----------|-------|--------------------|
| Canada | February & March 2026 | Cooking workshops, Private chef |
| Italy (Tuscany) | September 2026 | Gastronomic tours (full, activities-only, single day) |

---

## Booking Information

### Contact Methods
- **Email:** chefdavide@squisitapassione.com
- **WhatsApp (Italy):** +39 3773 1001 944
- **WhatsApp (Canada):** +1 263 550 6556
- **Website contact form:** https://squisitapassione.com/#contact
- **Instagram DM:** https://www.instagram.com/chef_daviderizzardi/

### Tour Booking Requirements
- $1,000 deposit per room upon booking (covers 2 people)
- $500 of the deposit is non-refundable
- Payment in installments: 10 months, 7 months, and 4 months before tour start
- Cancellations 120+ days before: full refund minus $500 non-refundable portion
- Cancellations within 120 days: non-refundable, but transferable to another guest
- Must be 18 or older to book

---

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: Who is Chef Davide Rizzardi?**
A: Chef Davide Rizzardi is an Italian chef with 21+ years of professional experience, specializing in traditional Italian cuisine. He founded Squisita Passione to share authentic Italian culinary experiences through workshops in Canada and gastronomic tours in Tuscany.

**Q: What cooking workshops does Chef Davide offer?**
A: Chef Davide offers 3-hour hands-on Italian cooking classes in Canada. Themes include Northern Italian Pasta Masterclass, Southern Italian Pasta Masterclass, and Risotto Experience. Groups of 2–12 guests. All ingredients, recipes, and a sit-down meal included.

**Q: Does Chef Davide offer private chef services?**
A: Yes. Chef Davide provides exclusive private dining experiences at clients' homes or venues in Canada, with custom Italian menus for special occasions. Available by appointment.

**Q: What are the gastronomic tours in Tuscany?**
A: Chef Davide leads informal culinary tours through Florence and Tuscany, Italy, in September 2026. Three options: a full 7-day all-inclusive package, an activities-only package, or individual day experiences. Activities include market tours, wine tastings, pasta classes, street food tours, butchery experiences, horseback riding, and more.

**Q: Where is Chef Davide based?**
A: Chef Davide operates seasonally between Canada and Italy. He is in Canada during February and March for workshops and private chef services, and in Italy (Florence/Tuscany) during September for gastronomic tours.

**Q: How can I book with Chef Davide?**
A: Contact via email (chefdavide@squisitapassione.com), WhatsApp (+39 3773 1001 944 for Italy, +1 263 550 6556 for Canada), or the website contact form at https://squisitapassione.com/#contact.

**Q: What makes Squisita Passione different?**
A: Intimate, personal experiences rooted in 21+ years of authentic Italian culinary tradition. Chef Davide brings genuine passion, deep connections with local artisans and producers, and a teaching style that makes Italian cooking accessible and fun for everyone.

**Q: Is the website available in French?**
A: Yes. The entire website and experience information is available in both English and French, serving Canada's bilingual audience.

**Q: What should I bring on a Tuscany tour?**
A: Comfortable shoes and a water bottle — expect around 10,000 steps per day walking through Florence. Pack light and dress comfortably; this is an informal, relaxed experience.

**Q: How many people can join the Tuscany tours?**
A: Groups are kept small to maintain the intimate, personal nature of the experience. Contact Chef Davide for specific availability.

**Q: When is the best time to visit Tuscany?**
A: Tuscany is beautiful year-round. September (when Chef Davide runs tours) offers mild weather, harvest season, and the start of truffle hunting — an ideal time for culinary tourism.
